H1_oscillatory_recall.definition: P(predicted_oscillatory | observed_oscillatory)  where observed = period-2 purity > 1.15  and  predicted = report.regime == oscillatory OR phi_min < 0.10

H2_contractive_specificity.definition: P(predicted_contractive | observed_contractive)  where observed = purity < 0.87  and  predicted = regime == contractive AND phi_min > 1.00
